verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are God in Heaven And here am I on earth So I'll let my words be few Jesus, I am so in love with you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I'll stand in awe of you [Jesus] Yes, I'll stand in awe of you And I'll let my words be few Jesus, I am so in love with You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The simplest of all love songs I want to bring to you So I'll let my words be few Jesus, I am so in love with You
